segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So, I understand you're interested in restaurant work?
segments.zh: 所以，我了解到你对餐厅工作感兴趣？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。我有一点经验，而且可以提供推荐信。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I've got a bit of experience and I can provide references.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's good.
segments.zh: 那很好。这些我稍后可以核实。现在，米洛餐厅目前有一些职位空缺。他们是一家非常不错的公司，福利很多。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I can check all that later.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now, Milo's Restaurants have some vacancies at the moment.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: They're a really good company to work for.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Lots of benefits.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh right.
segments.zh: 哦，好的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。他们在照顾员工方面口碑很好。比如，所有员工都能接受培训——即使是临时工也不例外。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: They've got a very good reputation for looking after staff.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: For example, all employees get training – even temporary staff.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh really?
segments.zh: 哦，真的吗？这很不寻常，对吧？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That's quite unusual, isn't it?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Certainly is.
segments.zh: 确实如此。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And do staff get free uniforms too?
segments.zh: 那员工也免费发放制服吗？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Um … you just need to wear a white T-shirt and black trousers, it says here.
segments.zh: 嗯……你只需要穿白色T恤和黑色裤子，这里写着。所以我猜不用……但为这样的大公司工作的另一个好处是，你可以在他们任何一家餐厅享受折扣。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So I guess not … But another benefit of working for a big company like this is that you can get a discount at any of their restaurants.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Even at weekends?
segments.zh: 周末也可以吗？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: No, but you'll be working then anyway.
segments.zh: 不行，但你周末反正也要上班。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh yes.
segments.zh: 哦，对。我想也是。他们大部分餐厅都在市中心，对吧？所以坐公交去很方便？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I suppose so.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Most of their restaurants are in the city centre, aren't they?

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So, easy to get to by bus?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的，没错。但如果你上晚班，午夜后下班，公司会付钱让你打车回家。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's right.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: But if you have to do a late shift and finish work after midnight, the company will pay for you to get a taxi home.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I probably won't need one.
segments.zh: 我可能不需要。我想我会骑自行车。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I think I'd use my bike.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。现在，他们对想要的人确实有一些非常具体的要求。Milo's是一家年轻、充满活力的公司，他们非常热衷于打造一个强大的团队。你能融入并和大家相处融洽非常重要。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now, they do have some quite specific requirements for the kind of person they're looking for.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Milo's is a young, dynamic company and they're really keen on creating a strong team.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: It's really important that you can fit in and get on well with everyone.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Yeah.
segments.zh: 是啊，我完全没问题。实际上听起来不错。我上一份工作也要求很高。我们必须确保提供非常高水平的服务。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I've got no problem with that.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: It sounds good, actually.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: The last place I worked for was quite demanding too.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: We had to make sure we gave a really high level of service.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's good to hear because that will be equally important at Milo's.
segments.zh: 听你这么说很好，因为这在米洛也同样重要。我知道他们想要注重细节的人。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I know they want people who have an eye for detail.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That's fine.
segments.zh: 没问题，我很习惯在这种环境下工作。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I'm very used to working in that kind of environment.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Perfect.
segments.zh: 太好了。那么唯一还需要的就是良好的沟通能力，所以你需要有英语证书。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So the only other thing that's required is good communication skills, so you'll need to have a certificate in English.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好，我们来看看米洛目前的职位空缺。第一个在威文霍街。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Let's have a look at the current job vacancies at Milo's.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: The first one is in Wivenhoe Street.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Sorry, where?
segments.zh: 抱歉，哪里？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Wivenhoe.
segments.zh: 威文霍。W-I-V-E-N-H-O-E。挺中心的位置，就在科克街附近。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: W-I-V-E-N-H-O-E.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: It's quite central, just off Cork Street.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh right.
segments.zh: 哦，好的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: They're looking for a breakfast supervisor.
segments.zh: 他们在招一名早餐主管。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That would be OK.
segments.zh: 那还行。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So you're probably familiar with the kind of responsibilities involved.
segments.zh: 那你应该对相关职责很熟悉了。比如检查所有份量是否准确，还有确保清洁设备的流程都按规定执行等等。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Obviously checking that all the portions are correct, etc., and then things like checking all the procedures for cleaning the equipment are being followed.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。那工资呢？我上一份工作是每小时9.5英镑，我希望比那多一点。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And what about the salary?

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: In my last job I was getting £9.50 per hour.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I was hoping to get a bit more than that.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Well, to begin with, you'd be getting £9.75 but that goes up to £11.25 after three months.
segments.zh: 嗯，刚开始是每小时9.75英镑，但三个月后会涨到11.25英镑。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: That's not too bad.
segments.zh: 那还不错。我猜上班时间很早吧？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And I suppose it's a very early start?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Mmm.
segments.zh: 嗯，这是这份工作唯一不吸引人的地方。但下午和晚上你都有空。餐厅早上7点开始供应早餐，你需要在5点半到那里准备一切。不过你12点半就能下班了。

words.def: 不吸引人的，令人不快的

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's the only unattractive thing about this job.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: But then you have the afternoons and evenings free.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So the restaurant starts serving breakfast from 7 a.m.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And you'd have to be there at 5.30 to set everything up.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: But you'd be finished at 12.30.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Mmm.
segments.zh: 嗯，就像你说的，这样也有好处。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Well, as you say, there are advantages to that.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now, you might also be interested in the job at the City Road branch.
segments.zh: 另外，您可能对城市路分店的工作也感兴趣。那是个初级厨师职位，同样需要承担一定责任。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: That's for a junior chef, so again a position of responsibility.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I might prefer that, actually.
segments.zh: 实际上，我可能更喜欢那个。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Right, well obviously this role would involve supporting the sous chef and other senior staff.
segments.zh: 好的，显然这个职位需要协助副厨师长和其他资深员工。您还要负责确保每周有足够的库存，并处理所有送货。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And you'd be responsible for making sure there's enough stock each week – and sorting out all the deliveries.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I've never done that before, but I imagine it's fairly straightforward, once you get the hang of it.
segments.zh: 我以前没做过，但我想一旦掌握了窍门，应该挺简单的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Yes, and you'd be working alongside more experienced staff to begin with, so I'm sure it wouldn't be a problem.
segments.zh: 是的，而且一开始您会和更有经验的员工一起工作，所以我相信不会有问题。这里的薪水稍微高一些，年薪是23,000英镑。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: The salary's slightly higher here.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: It's an annual salary of £23,000.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I know that if they like you, it's likely you'll be promoted quite quickly.
segments.zh: 我知道如果他们喜欢您，您很可能会很快得到晋升。所以这一点值得考虑。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So that's worth thinking about.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。听起来确实有趣。工作时间怎么样？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: It does sound interesting.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: What are the hours like?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: The usual, I think.
segments.zh: 我觉得跟平时差不多。晚上和周末经常要上班，但周一休息。不过每四周可以休一个周日。那要不要我把……

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: There's a lot of evening and weekend work, but they're closed on Mondays.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: But you do get one Sunday off every four weeks.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: So would you like me to send your …

items.prompt: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

pairs.note: 题干中的employees在原文中直接出现，没有变化。
题干中的get在原文中直接出现，没有变化。
题干中的training在原文中直接出现，没有变化。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写一个词，原文中直接出现'training'，且前后没有同义替换，直接定位即可。

pairs.note: 题干benefits是复数，原文benefit是单数，意思相同。
题干说'提供给所有员工'，原文说'你可以得到'，意思一致。
题干填空处对应原文的discount，直接匹配。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'you can get a discount'，其中discount就是题干中需要填写的福利，且benefit与Benefits同义替换。

items.prompt: 2 ... during weekdays at all Milo's Restaurants

pairs.note: 题干说工作日期间，原文说晚班，晚班通常在工作日，所以是时间上的替换。

pairs.p: company will pay for you to get a taxi home
pairs.note: 题干说在所有Milo餐厅，原文说公司会付钱让你打车回家，暗示这是公司政策，适用于所有餐厅。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问工作日期间在所有Milo餐厅的情况，定位句提到晚班后公司付钱打车回家，所以答案就是taxi。

pairs.note: provided 和 gave 都表示'提供'，是同义替换
答案词在原文原样出现

paraphrase.explain: 题干中'provided after midnight'对应原文'gave ... after midnight'，其中'provided'替换为'gave'，'after midnight'不变，答案'service'在原文直接出现。

items.prompt: Person specification: must be prepared to work well in a team

pairs.note: 团队合作能力被替换为沟通能力，两者在职场中常互换

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'good communication skills'和'certificate in English'，题干要求团队合作，原文用沟通能力替代，答案对应英语证书。

items.prompt: Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 题干中的'current job vacancies'在原文中完全一致，直接定位到该处。
题干中的'Milo's'在原文中完全一致，帮助确认地点。
答案'Wivenhoe'是原文中'Wivenhoe Street'的一部分，注意答案只取街道名。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的'current job vacancies'和'Milo's'定位到原文第一句，然后找到街道名'Wivenhoe Street'，答案取'Wivenhoe'。

pairs.note: 题干问位置，原文用'involved'表示涉及的范围，需结合上下文理解
题干数字6对应原文单词equipment，注意发音相似

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的数字6与原文equipment发音相近，且题干Location对应原文involved，通过同音词和上下文定位答案。

pairs.note: 题干问职位对应的工资，原文用'you'd be getting'引出工资数，是题干关键词的间接表达。
题干是职位，原文直接给出数字，但需注意是9.75而非11.25。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接提到工资£9.75，与题干职位对应，注意区分试用期后涨至£11.25。

items.prompt: Responsibilities include: Checking portions, etc. are correct; Making sure 7 ... is clean

pairs.note: 题干说'确保...干净'，原文说'处理所有送货'，意思不同但都指向同一职责。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中'Making sure ... is clean'与原文'sorting out all the deliveries'对应，但含义不同，需注意听原文具体内容。

items.prompt: Pay and conditions: Starting salary 8 £ ... per hour; Start work at 5.30 a.m.

pairs.note: 题干说5:30开始工作，但定位句没有直接对应，而是提到‘Sunday off’，说明周日休息，与起始时间无关，但通过排除法定位到Sunday。

paraphrase.explain: 题干提到起始工资和开始时间，但定位句没有直接对应，而是提到‘Sunday off every four weeks’，因此答案应为Sunday。
